subcodes.first_line: O God! How can I recount Thy praise, or voice thine attributes and glorification in my communion with Thee, or become immersed in the ocean of my supplications unto Thee? [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم کیف احصی الثناء علیک و انطق بالمحامد و النعوت تبتلا الیک و استغرق فی بحر مناجاتی الیک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @apocalyptic imagery, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @eulogies; reminiscences
